name: Pickled Carrot, Fennel, and Radish Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. With a mandoline or sharp knife, cut carrots into short julienne strips (about 1/8 inch thick).
2. Cut bell pepper into the same julienne strips.
3. Steam carrots covered in a steamer set over simmering water for 5 to 6 minutes, or until crisp-tender. Transfer to a bowl.
4. Steam bell pepper for 1 to 2 minutes, or until crisp-tender, and add to the carrot mixture.
5. Halve fennel bulb lengthwise and core. Cut fennel into short julienne strips (about 1/8 inch thick).
6. Halve onion lengthwise and cut into the same julienne strips.
7. Add fennel and onion to the carrot mixture.
8. In a saucepan, bring remaining ingredients to a boil, stirring to dissolve sugar. Pour over vegetables.
9. Marinate vegetables covered and chilled for at least 1 hour, up to 1 week.
10. Serve relish chilled or at room temperature with poultry, veal, pork, or lamb.
